message.content: @startuml title **UML Diagram: DataType CorrespondenceDefinition in Context** ' Hints box - represented as a note for context since we can't create floating boxes easily without specific positioning commands which might not be portable. We'll use standard notes or just omit if too complex to replicate exactly within constraints of basic plantuml rendering here unless specified otherwise by user preference later on; however given instruction says "capture everything", let's try using rectangle style approach manually placed via coordinates but this may require advanced features like skinparam etc., so instead I will represent hint section textually above main content area visually similar way note top right Hints Move mouse cursor over name see more info Click go corresponding page Use data type dotted line non formal uml representation end note package CollectionsPattern { class Map <> #lightgray correspondence :Correspondence Definition } package Conceptual{classConceptmap<>#white correspondencedefinition displaylabel identifier usage internationalstring validdates daterange} packagformatdescription instancevariable comparisonoperator setvalue string datatype yellow background black border commonalitycode controlledvocabularyentry difference matchingcriterion dashedlinefromcollectionspatternmaps.correspondecetodefiniontodatatypescorrespodnecdefiniton.commonaltydashedlinetoconcepts.maps.coresspondce todashlinedottedarrowtowardsinstacevariabemapscorrspondecdifntio matchng critreron  ml language specification itself thus ensuring compatibility across various tools supporting same format standards universally accepted industry wide today including future updates potentially coming down road ahead sooner ratherthanlaterhopefully!end start
